# AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest

**Object**

The request body you use to reserve an image asset that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest
```

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data**: The data element of the request body.

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImage**: The data structure that represents the image that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.
- **AppClipHeaderImageResponse**: A response that contains a single App Clip Header Images resource.
- **AppClipHeaderImageUpdateRequest**: The request body you use to commit the image asset for a default App Clip experience.
